daily_revenue_per_guest_usd.rationale: High-end international casinos report daily gaming revenue per occupied seat from a few hundred USD at mid-tier venues to several thousand at VIP/diplomatic-mix rooms; wide band reflects high-roller variance.

daily_operating_cost_usd.rationale: Sum of 24/7 staff, 2.5 MW microgrid energy, T2CA vetting, security, and venue overhead for a 999-guest containerized venue; container-casino opex comparables span this range.

expected_utilization_rate.rationale: Peer 24/7 high-end venues average 0.3-0.7 occupancy with seasonal and diplomatic-event spikes; T2CA throughput friction biases toward the lower end.

aml_bank_settlement_revenue_reduction_fr.rationale: Plan's stated up-to-20% cap on high-roller spend reduction from bank-only settlement; bounded 5-30% to reflect uncertainty in actual VIP behavior under fungible-only markers.

court_political_reversal_remediation_win.rationale: Plan cites 90-day court-mandated remediation window; bracketed 60-120 days to reflect possible accelerated or extended court orders for federal-site restoration.

relocation_blackout_days.rationale: Plan assumes 7-day Phase 1-to-Phase 2 container relocation blackout; data-collection task targets sub-8 days but logistics-risk reviewers flag overruns up to ~12 days.
